```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="ISO-8859-1"?>
<DualSPHConfig version="5.4">
  <Fluids>
    <Fluid id="1" name="Water" density="1000.0" viscosity="0.001" color="0,0,255"/>
  </Fluids>
  <Boundaries>
    <Box id="1" name="Tank" type="Rigid" color="255,0,0">
      <Position x="0.0" y="0.0" z="0.0"/>
      <Size x="0.6" y="0.3" z="0.65"/>
      <Motion type="Oscillating" amplitude="0.007" frequency="0.756" direction="1"/>
    </Box>
  </Boundaries>
  <NumericalWaveTank>
    <FluidBox id="1" fluid="Water" name="WaterBox">
      <Position x="0.0" y="0.0" z="0.0"/>
      <Size x="0.6" y="0.3" z="0.083"/>
    </FluidBox>
  </NumericalWaveTank>
  <Time>
    <tmax>10.0</tmax>
    <timestep>0.1</timestep>
    <dt>0.0001</dt>
  </Time>
  <Output>
    <timestep>0.1</timestep>
    <OutputFormat>binary</OutputFormat>
    <OutputDir>output</OutputDir>
  </Output>
  <NumericalParams>
    <dp>0.001</dp>
    <kernel>Wendland</kernel>
    <gravity>0.0,0.0,-9.81</gravity>
  </NumericalParams>
</DualSPHConfig>
```
